# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Login to Docker Hub
        uses: docker/login-action@v1
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}

      - name: Build and push image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v2
        with:
          context: .
          push: true

      - name: Configure production environment
        run: |
          echo "export APP_ENV=production" >> ~/.bashrc
          source ~/.bashrc

      - name: Deploy to production
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.SSH_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.SSH_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.SSH_PASSWORD }}
          script: |
            cd /var/www/myapp
            git pull origin main
            npm install
            npm run deploy
